summary: Iteration 36 - Sucursales (Branches) Feature Testing. Backend: 12/12 tests PASS (100%). Frontend: All UI tests PASS. The new branch feature allows providers to add up to 5 additional locations that inherit services, amenities, and gallery from the parent provider.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/providers/my-branches - Returns list of branches for authenticated provider
POST /api/providers/my-branches - Returns 400 when business_name is empty (validation works)
POST /api/providers/my-branches - Successfully creates a branch with all fields
POST /api/providers/my-branches - Created branch appears in GET list (persistence verified)
DELETE /api/providers/my-branches/{branch_id} - Returns 404 for invalid branch ID
DELETE /api/providers/my-branches/{branch_id} - Successfully deletes branch and removes from list
Branch appears in public search (inherits parent's approved status)
Branch inherits description and services from parent provider
frontend_ui_tests: Provider dashboard loads with 'Sucursales' tab in navigation
Clicking 'Sucursales' tab shows branch management content
'+ Agregar Sucursal' button is visible and clickable
Branch form opens with all required fields (name, phone, address, comuna, region)
Form info message about inheritance displayed correctly
Submitting form creates branch and shows success toast
Created branch appears in list with name, address, phone
Delete button (X icon) visible on each branch item

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented: tab-branches, tab-branches-content, add-branch-btn, branch-form, branch-name, branch-phone, branch-address, branch-comuna, branch-region, save-branch-btn, delete-branch-{id}
Branch routes correctly placed BEFORE /providers/{provider_id} wildcard to avoid route conflicts
BranchCreate model uses PydanticBaseModel to avoid naming conflicts with other models
Branch inherits approved status from parent, allowing it to appear in public search
seed_data_creation: Test branches created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36: Sucursales (Branches) feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints at /api/providers/my-branches support GET (list), POST (create), DELETE (remove) operations. Max 5 branches per provider. Branches inherit services, amenities, gallery, and approved status from parent provider. Frontend has Sucursales tab in provider dashboard with form to add branches and list showing all branches with delete buttons. All tests passed.
